summary: Iteration 112 - Testing new Quick Viability Search and Interactive Demo features. All tests passed (8 backend, 25+ frontend checks). Both new homepage sections render correctly with full functionality.
passed_tests: POST /api/public/quick-viability returns valid JSON with score, verdict, signals, strengths, risks, summary
API rejects empty product name (400)
API rejects too-short product name < 2 chars (400)
API rejects whitespace-only product name (400)
API rejects missing product_name field (400)
API handles special characters in product name
API works without authentication (public endpoint)
Quick Viability Search section renders on homepage
Search input with placeholder text exists
'Check viability' button exists and is clickable
4 suggestion chips render (LED sunset lamp, Portable blender, Posture corrector, Ice roller)
Clicking suggestion chip fills input with product name (does NOT auto-submit)
Submitting search shows loading state then result card
Result card displays score (X/100 format)
Result card displays verdict badge (Strong Potential/Promising/Mixed Signals/High Risk)
Result card displays signal breakdown bars (trend_momentum, market_saturation, margin_potential, uk_fit)
Result card displays strengths list
Result card displays risks list
Result card displays summary text
Result card displays 'Get full analysis' CTA button linking to /signup
Interactive Demo section renders on homepage
4 step tabs render (Browse, Score, Analyse, Launch)
Preview panel shows mock browser chrome (red/amber/green dots, URL bar)
Clicking each tab changes preview panel content
'Next' button advances to next step
On last step (Launch), 'Try it for real' link replaces Next button
'Try it for real — Start Free' CTA button links to /signup
Step progress indicator dots show current step (active dot wider)
Hero section renders correctly
Trust bar renders correctly
Feature highlights section renders correctly
Trending products section renders correctly
Final CTA section renders correctly
Features page (/features) still works
How It Works page (/how-it-works) still works
Pricing page (/pricing) still works
Mobile responsive (390x844 viewport tested)
No console errors
critical_code_review_comments: QuickViabilitySearch.jsx correctly implements all required functionality with proper data-testid attributes
InteractiveDemo.jsx correctly implements 4-step product tour with mock data
Backend /api/public/quick-viability endpoint properly validates input (2-100 chars) and uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key
API response structure matches frontend expectations (score, verdict, signals, strengths, risks, summary)
Suggestion chips correctly fill input without auto-submitting (per requirements)
Error handling implemented for API failures
Loading state properly shown during AI processing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 112 verified two new homepage features: (1) QuickViabilitySearch component with AI-powered product analysis via POST /api/public/quick-viability - takes 5-10 seconds to respond, returns score/verdict/signals/strengths/risks/summary. (2) InteractiveDemo component with 4 clickable tabs (Browse/Score/Analyse/Launch) showing mock product tour data. Both sections render correctly on desktop and mobile. All other pages (Features, How It Works, Pricing) still work. No mocked APIs - the quick viability endpoint uses real GPT-5.2.
